title: Interrogations
content:
Using the handle you found in Vane's wallet and your own clearance, you open a secure, encrypted messaging app. You ping his widow and his personal assistant.||💬 Chat 1: Helen Vane (The Widow)
Helen: Who is this? How did you get this encrypted handle?

choices.text: 'I'm an independent investigator. I believe Thomas was murdered.'
'A friend of Thomas. I'm trying to finish what he started.'
